summary: Manual code review approved GH-171 Desktop Task Thread fidelity QA implementation at PR head d32fd6fd4fe55e36dd56540e47b63d630265f221. The code change is limited to renderer CSS for right inspector tab density and source/content spacing, plus screenshot/metrics evidence and GH-171 Loom carriers. It does not approve new product behavior, Stage 5, live Core/Harbor/Lode calls, or final data structures. Post-review drift after this record must remain limited to review carriers or PR metadata.
